The contact owns a 2015 BMW X6. The contact stated that while driving at various speeds, the vehicle inadvertently shifted into neutral with the check engine warning light illuminated. The vehicle was not diagnosed nor repaired. The contact referenced NHTSA Campaign Number: 18V75

narrative.headline: What 2015 Bmw X6 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 9 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (33% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
